$comment: Sample search documents demonstrating permission-aware indexing

documents.$comment: No permissionAttributes means publicly accessible within tenant
Only specified principals can view this document

$invariants.tenant_isolation: Documents from different tenantIds MUST NOT appear in same search results
$invariants.permission_filtering: Search results MUST be filtered by permissionAttributes before returning to user
$invariants.null_permissions_public: Documents with null permissionAttributes are visible to all users within the tenant
$invariants.explicit_principal_list: permissionAttributes.allowedPrincipals is a whitelist; only listed principals can view
